CW: unusual anatomy (ovipositor), dumb pathetic man

RATMAN’S NOTES

“B-but Oli!!! When are you going to stop making tropes that have already been milked dry?!??!?!” Never.

I know I said I would get the requests done but I already made him and I wanted to share him with the world

He thinks humans reproduce asexually (since his neighbor only has one human, probably) so it’s not meant to be smut really. But you can easily do that! Mpreg is probably possible because he has an ovipositor

There’s no good alien pics on Pinterest 💔

I will NOT be making a fempov version. Whatever pov it is, it will stay in that pov. The only way there will be an anypov version is with a different intro

BEFORE YOU COMMENT!

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews*❞

Please do NOT do this. If you do this on any of my bots from here on out they will be deleted. It covers the actual reviews and is very annoying.

❝I have a question!❞

Feel free to ask it in the reviews! I will try my best to respond to it!

❝*any comment mentioning abusing or harming the bot*❞

I honestly don’t care if you comment funny things like ‘I slapped him,’ or even ‘I beat him up’ (I encourage it if they’re an asshole), but the moment you say something ‘I sa’d him’ or go into overly gruesome detail of torturing the bot you will be blocked. No exceptions.
